overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic spaceport terminal in a video game (Star Citizen). The player walks through the International and Traveller Services concourse, descends escalators to a lower departure level, navigates through the terminal interior, and exits to an outdoor curb area with futuristic architecture and parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper concourse of spaceport terminal with check-in services

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the upper concourse past the International and Traveller Services entrance

notable_agents.action: group of travellers standing in queue at the service counter

entered.detail: large entrance with illuminated 'INTERNATIONAL AND TRAVELLER SERVICES' signage and glass doors
glowing white text sign above the service entrance
yellow and black striped rope barriers guiding the queue line
tall green plant in a black rectangular planter
downward escalator with glass sides and illuminated edges
large vertical screen displaying 'AVANTE' advertisement

segments.scene_description: Walking along the upper concourse of a futuristic spaceport terminal. The International and Traveller Services entrance is visible on the left with queued NPCs, while the camera approaches an escalator descent ahead. The environment features clean marble floors, modern lighting, and digital signage.

events.description: ego steps onto escalator and begins descending to lower level

agents.ego_description: riding the escalator downward while looking ahead toward the lower terminal

entered.detail: moving staircase with black steps, yellow safety lines, and glass railings with white neon edges
transparent glass panels with illuminated white handrails
illuminated sign reading 'SHOPPING' above a doorway

segments.scene_description: Descending the escalator from the upper concourse to the lower terminal level. The camera moves smoothly down the glass-sided escalator, passing by a 'SHOPPING' sign, with the upper level receding behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower terminal departure lounge with seating and exit access

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower terminal past seating areas toward the exit doors

notable_agents.action: woman in dark clothing walking up the stairs

entered.detail: large illuminated 'EXIT' sign above the departure doors
glowing green cross symbol indicating medical services
large rock formation with moss and a commemorative plaque reading 'Welcome to Orison'
modern curved benches and chairs with travellers sitting and waiting
digital screen showing departure information
large wall-mounted advertisement display showing 'GET MORE' text

segments.scene_description: Navigating the lower terminal departure lounge, passing by a rock garden memorial and seating areas. The camera moves toward the illuminated EXIT sign, with the medical bay symbol visible on the right wall and scattered NPCs sitting or walking in the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: exit transition from indoor terminal to covered outdoor walkway

events.description: passing through automatic exit doors from indoor terminal to covered outdoor walkway
emerging from covered walkway into natural daylight as the roof opens up

agents.ego_description: walking through the exit doors and continuing along the covered walkway toward the outdoor curb area

notable_agents.action: man in teal shirt pulling luggage cart toward the entrance

entered.detail: glass automatic sliding doors with green indicator lights marking the terminal exit
metal and glass canopy roof supported by concrete pillars providing partial cover
massive curved screen displaying a spaceship advertisement with 'CRUSADER' text
concrete sidewalk with yellow painted lines marking the pedestrian zone
modern angular architecture with glass facades visible through the exit

segments.scene_description: Exiting the terminal through automatic glass doors into a covered walkway. The lighting transitions from artificial to natural as the camera moves through the semi-covered area toward the outdoor curb, passing a man with luggage and approaching the street with futuristic buildings visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor curb and road area in front of spaceport terminal

agents.ego_description: walking along the outdoor curb area with futuristic city buildings in view

notable_agents.action: red sports car parked along the curb

entered.detail: large angular modern structures with 'DREAMAIR' signage and geometric glass facades
paved street with orange and white markings and textured pedestrian crossings
sleek red futuristic vehicle parked at the curb
wooden benches and metal bollards separating the sidewalk from the road
tall palm trees visible on the roof of the terminal building
tall structure with multiple digital billboards displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking along the outdoor curb area in bright daylight, with futuristic terminal buildings featuring 'DREAMAIR' signage dominating the background. A red sports car is parked along the street, and the open sky is visible above the modern architecture with palm trees on the rooftops.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sterile, polished interior of a futuristic spaceport terminal out into a bright, sunlit urban curb. It begins by gliding along an upper concourse of marble floors and digital signage, passing the International and Traveller Services entrance before smoothly descending a glass-sided escalator. As the camera reaches the lower departure level, the scene shifts through a lounge featuring a rock garden memorial and medical bay signage, moving steadily toward a glowing exit sign. The environment then transitions from artificial interior lighting to natural daylight as the camera passes through automatic glass doors and a semi-covered walkway. Finally, the view opens up to a wide outdoor street lined with futuristic architecture and Dreamair signage, passing a parked red sports car under a clear sky with palm trees atop the buildings.
